title: Build and Ship a Production Feed Aggregator in Go 1.26
description: Advanced Go backend learners ready to integrate feed standards, bounded XML and HTTP, PostgreSQL, scheduling, multi-instance concurrency, APIs, accessible presentation, security, testing, deployment, and recovery into one cumulative service. This original, research-backed path uses repeated retrieval, cumulative artifacts, changed-case labs, stakeholder projects, and a performance exam.
outcomes: Demonstrate a cumulative multi-tenant rss 2.0 and atom 1.0 service from authorized discovery through publisher-friendly ingestion, postgresql storage, search, apis, and an accessible content-safe reader through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

Demonstrate go ownership, pgx pooling and transactions, migrations, conditional http, bounded xml, normalization, durable scheduling, fenced claims, worker pools, observability, security, testing, deployment, backup, and recovery through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

Demonstrate original deterministic browser models plus controlled go compiler, httptest, postgresql, race, fuzz, subprocess, container, load, accessibility, backup, restore, and release transfer gates through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.
Demonstrate five distinct stakeholder projects and a cumulative production defense through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

competencies.statement: Define reader group, decision, task journey, freshness need, harm, and observable value before choosing architecture.
misconceptions: Collecting many links automatically creates a useful reader product.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define reader group, decision, task journey, freshness need, harm, and observable value before choosing architecture.

competencies.statement: Define respectful fetch frequency, identification, caching, opt-out, correction, deletion, and incident contacts for publishers.
misconceptions: Public feed URLs grant unlimited collection and permanent retention rights.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define respectful fetch frequency, identification, caching, opt-out, correction, deletion, and incident contacts for publishers.

competencies.statement: Separate discovery, fetch, parse, normalize, persist, schedule, serve, and present responsibilities with explicit ports.
misconceptions: A single handler that performs every operation is simpler and therefore safer.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate discovery, fetch, parse, normalize, persist, schedule, serve, and present responsibilities with explicit ports.

misconceptions: A tenant field in application structs prevents cross-tenant database reads.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Require tenant scope in repository APIs, SQL predicates, unique keys, tests, metrics, exports, and administrative paths.

competencies.statement: Minimize follows, read state, search, telemetry, retention, access, export, deletion, and support exposure by purpose.
misconceptions: Reading history is harmless operational metadata.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Minimize follows, read state, search, telemetry, retention, access, export, deletion, and support exposure by purpose.

competencies.statement: Record actor, decision, resource, outcome, and correlation evidence while redacting tokens, feed content, private URLs, SQL, and sensitive queries.
misconceptions: More audit detail always improves security.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record actor, decision, resource, outcome, and correlation evidence while redacting tokens, feed content, private URLs, SQL, and sensitive queries.

competencies.statement: Choose a deterministic immutable-enough order with unique tie-breaker and document updates that can move entries.
misconceptions: published_at alone creates a total stable order.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose a deterministic immutable-enough order with unique tie-breaker and document updates that can move entries.

competencies.statement: Encode version, tenant, sort values, direction, filters, expiry, and integrity without exposing authority or accepting arbitrary SQL.
misconceptions: Base64 makes a cursor trustworthy and opaque.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Encode version, tenant, sort values, direction, filters, expiry, and integrity without exposing authority or accepting arbitrary SQL.

competencies.statement: Build forward and backward keyset predicates that match sort direction, null policy, indexes, and limit-plus-one boundaries.
misconceptions: Replacing OFFSET with one greater-than predicate is always correct.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Build forward and backward keyset predicates that match sort direction, null policy, indexes, and limit-plus-one boundaries.

competencies.statement: Test equal timestamps, inserts, edits, deletes, filter changes, reverse navigation, empty pages, and cursor expiry.
misconceptions: One static fixture proves pagination consistency.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test equal timestamps, inserts, edits, deletes, filter changes, reverse navigation, empty pages, and cursor expiry.

competencies.statement: Expose next and previous links, result counts or bounded uncertainty, stable headings, focus behavior, and no infinite-scroll requirement.
misconceptions: Cursor pagination must be implemented as endless scrolling.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Expose next and previous links, result counts or bounded uncertainty, stable headings, focus behavior, and no infinite-scroll requirement.

competencies.statement: Build a provenance-aware tsvector from admitted title, summary, safe text content, author, and categories with weighting and language policy.
misconceptions: Indexing raw feed HTML creates the best search document.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Build a provenance-aware tsvector from admitted title, summary, safe text content, author, and categories with weighting and language policy.

competencies.statement: Convert bounded user input through an explicit plainto, websearch, or structured tsquery policy and reject pathological or empty requests.
misconceptions: Passing user text directly to to_tsquery is safe and intuitive.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Convert bounded user input through an explicit plainto, websearch, or structured tsquery policy and reject pathological or empty requests.

competencies.statement: Pair GIN and supporting indexes with representative EXPLAIN evidence, data scale, selectivity, write cost, and regression thresholds.
misconceptions: The presence of a GIN index proves every search uses it efficiently.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Pair GIN and supporting indexes with representative EXPLAIN evidence, data scale, selectivity, write cost, and regression thresholds.

competencies.statement: Combine text rank, recency, source, and deterministic tie-breakers without claiming objective relevance.
misconceptions: ts_rank alone is a universally fair relevance score.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Combine text rank, recency, source, and deterministic tie-breakers without claiming objective relevance.

competencies.statement: Generate bounded snippets from safe text or sanitize marked fragments and expose matched terms without unsafe feed markup.
misconceptions: ts_headline output can always be injected into HTML unchanged.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Generate bounded snippets from safe text or sanitize marked fragments and expose matched terms without unsafe feed markup.

competencies.statement: Treat titles, authors, summaries, HTML, images, categories, and URLs as untrusted publisher input through render-time safety boundaries.
misconceptions: XML parsing makes feed content safe HTML.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Treat titles, authors, summaries, HTML, images, categories, and URLs as untrusted publisher input through render-time safety boundaries.

competencies.statement: Prefer safe text, use a tested allowlist sanitizer only where needed, rewrite links, block active content, and preserve readable structure.
misconceptions: Escaping every string and allowing raw HTML are the only two choices.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Prefer safe text, use a tested allowlist sanitizer only where needed, rewrite links, block active content, and preserve readable structure.

competencies.statement: Use one page heading, feed and entry landmarks, descriptive link text, metadata lists, dates, language, and source provenance.
misconceptions: Visual cards provide enough structure for assistive technology.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use one page heading, feed and entry landmarks, descriptive link text, metadata lists, dates, language, and source provenance.

competencies.statement: Support complete keyboard flow, visible focus, large targets, announced refresh and errors, and stable focus after dynamic updates.
misconceptions: Browsers automatically place focus correctly after content changes.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Support complete keyboard flow, visible focus, large targets, announced refresh and errors, and stable focus after dynamic updates.

competencies.statement: Support narrow reflow, zoom, reduced motion, non-color state, image alternatives, content warnings, and user-controlled media.
misconceptions: Responsive CSS alone proves the reader is accessible.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Support narrow reflow, zoom, reduced motion, non-color state, image alternatives, content warnings, and user-controlled media.

competencies.statement: Keep read, unread, starred, hidden, saved, and tag relationships scoped to principal, tenant, and entry without mutating shared content.
misconceptions: Marking an entry read should change the shared entry row.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep read, unread, starred, hidden, saved, and tag relationships scoped to principal, tenant, and entry without mutating shared content.

competencies.statement: Make set-state commands idempotent with explicit desired state, preconditions where needed, and stable response semantics.
misconceptions: A toggle endpoint is naturally retry safe.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Make set-state commands idempotent with explicit desired state, preconditions where needed, and stable response semantics.

competencies.statement: Define bounded all-or-nothing or per-item bulk semantics, authorization, result reconciliation, and retry behavior.
misconceptions: Bulk updates may succeed partially without item-level evidence.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define bounded all-or-nothing or per-item bulk semantics, authorization, result reconciliation, and retry behavior.

competencies.statement: Use versions or timestamps deliberately for multi-device conflicts and distinguish stale writes from repeated commands.
misconceptions: Last write wins is always acceptable for personal state.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use versions or timestamps deliberately for multi-device conflicts and distinguish stale writes from repeated commands.

competencies.statement: Derive or maintain unread and saved counts with transaction, cache, repair, and changed-case evidence.
misconceptions: A displayed counter cannot drift if each command updates it.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Derive or maintain unread and saved counts with transaction, cache, repair, and changed-case evidence.

competencies.statement: Classify public, tenant-private, user-private, sensitive, non-storeable, and invalidation-sensitive representations before fields are set.
misconceptions: GET responses are safe for shared caches by default.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Classify public, tenant-private, user-private, sensitive, non-storeable, and invalidation-sensitive representations before fields are set.

competencies.statement: Derive validators from authorized representation version, query, locale, content negotiation, and principal scope and choose weak or strong semantics.
misconceptions: Hashing the response body creates the right ETag for every client.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Derive validators from authorized representation version, query, locale, content negotiation, and principal scope and choose weak or strong semantics.

competencies.statement: Evaluate If-None-Match precedence and If-Modified-Since correctly after authentication and representation selection.
misconceptions: A matching ETag can bypass current authorization.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Evaluate If-None-Match precedence and If-Modified-Since correctly after authentication and representation selection.

competencies.statement: Apply If-Match or version preconditions to conflict-sensitive writes and return current recovery evidence on mismatch.
misconceptions: Idempotent methods never need concurrency preconditions.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Apply If-Match or version preconditions to conflict-sensitive writes and return current recovery evidence on mismatch.

competencies.statement: Test subscribe, ingest, edit, delete, read-state, authorization, locale, and deployment changes against cache keys and validators.
misconceptions: A short max-age removes the need for invalidation tests.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test subscribe, ingest, edit, delete, read-state, authorization, locale, and deployment changes against cache keys and validators.

competencies.statement: Correlate request, tenant-safe source key, schedule claim, fetch attempt, validator, parse, transaction, and response without leaking raw private identifiers.
misconceptions: One request ID explains background work across retries and processes.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Correlate request, tenant-safe source key, schedule claim, fetch attempt, validator, parse, transaction, and response without leaking raw private identifiers.

competencies.statement: Emit bounded structured events with causal error identity and tested redaction for URLs, content, queries, headers, tokens, SQL, and personal state.
misconceptions: Debug logging full feed payloads is acceptable outside production.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Emit bounded structured events with causal error identity and tested redaction for URLs, content, queries, headers, tokens, SQL, and personal state.

competencies.statement: Define availability, successful-poll, publisher-respect, ingestion-lag, reader-latency, and restore indicators with windows and error budgets.
misconceptions: Average fetch duration measures reader freshness.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define availability, successful-poll, publisher-respect, ingestion-lag, reader-latency, and restore indicators with windows and error budgets.

competencies.statement: Bound metric labels, trace sampling, event retention, tenant exposure, and telemetry cost while retaining incident usefulness.
misconceptions: Using source URL as a metric label makes dashboards easier.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Bound metric labels, trace sampling, event retention, tenant exposure, and telemetry cost while retaining incident usefulness.

competencies.statement: Load representative publishers, item sizes, update rates, tenants, reads, searches, failures, and restores against CPU, memory, connections, locks, and budgets.
misconceptions: A handler requests-per-second benchmark proves ingestion capacity.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Load representative publishers, item sizes, update rates, tenants, reads, searches, failures, and restores against CPU, memory, connections, locks, and budgets.

competencies.statement: Create small original RSS, Atom, namespace, encoding, date, identity, update, malformed, entity, oversized, and extension fixtures with explicit expected evidence.
misconceptions: One real-world feed fixture provides broad coverage.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Create small original RSS, Atom, namespace, encoding, date, identity, update, malformed, entity, oversized, and extension fixtures with explicit expected evidence.

competencies.statement: Test URL, discovery, parse, normalize, schedule, state, cursor, search, and policy functions with injected clocks and deterministic inputs.
misconceptions: Only integration tests can prove meaningful backend behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test URL, discovery, parse, normalize, schedule, state, cursor, search, and policy functions with injected clocks and deterministic inputs.

competencies.statement: Fuzz XML tokens, URLs, dates, cursors, state transitions, and normalization with bounded invariants and preserved minimal failures.
misconceptions: A fuzzer finding no panic proves semantic correctness.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Fuzz XML tokens, URLs, dates, cursors, state transitions, and normalization with bounded invariants and preserved minimal failures.

competencies.statement: Run targeted concurrent claims, workers, caches, cancellation, pool shutdown, and handler tests under the race detector with goroutine and resource completion checks.
misconceptions: The race detector proves there are no deadlocks or leaks.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Run targeted concurrent claims, workers, caches, cancellation, pool shutdown, and handler tests under the race detector with goroutine and resource completion checks.

competencies.statement: Label browser models, unit fixtures, loopback HTTP, temporary PostgreSQL, race, fuzz, load, accessibility, platform, and production evidence separately.
misconceptions: A green test suite supports every production claim.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Label browser models, unit fixtures, loopback HTTP, temporary PostgreSQL, race, fuzz, load, accessibility, platform, and production evidence separately.

competencies.statement: Start an isolated compatible PostgreSQL 18 database, apply real migrations, seed original data, isolate tests, and prove teardown.
misconceptions: SQLite or a query mock proves PostgreSQL constraints and locking.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Start an isolated compatible PostgreSQL 18 database, apply real migrations, seed original data, isolate tests, and prove teardown.

competencies.statement: Use httptest origins and custom transports for validators, redirects, DNS decisions, compression, slow bodies, malformed bytes, disconnects, and publisher budgets.
misconceptions: Public feed URLs are the most realistic integration test dependency.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use httptest origins and custom transports for validators, redirects, DNS decisions, compression, slow bodies, malformed bytes, disconnects, and publisher budgets.

competencies.statement: Inject constraint, serialization, deadlock, lock wait, pool exhaustion, cancellation, connection loss, and commit ambiguity with expected recovery.
misconceptions: Database failures can be represented by returning one generic error.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Inject constraint, serialization, deadlock, lock wait, pool exhaustion, cancellation, connection loss, and commit ambiguity with expected recovery.

competencies.statement: Run built commands or services in subprocesses for startup, migration, health, signal, drain, exit status, and incomplete-work evidence.
misconceptions: Calling main-like functions proves OS signal and process behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Run built commands or services in subprocesses for startup, migration, health, signal, drain, exit status, and incomplete-work evidence.

competencies.statement: Reconcile HTTP bytes, parsed entries, committed rows, versions, validators, queue state, API output, telemetry, and cleanup after success and failure.
misconceptions: Matching one API response proves the ingestion pipeline.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reconcile HTTP bytes, parsed entries, committed rows, versions, validators, queue state, API output, telemetry, and cleanup after success and failure.

competencies.statement: Trace assets, actors, trust boundaries, entry points, abuse cases, controls, detection, response, and residual risk across every data flow.
misconceptions: Using HTTPS and parameterized SQL covers the service threat model.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Trace assets, actors, trust boundaries, entry points, abuse cases, controls, detection, response, and residual risk across every data flow.

competencies.statement: Combine URL grammar, allow or deny policy, address validation, redirect checks, proxy controls, egress isolation, metadata blocking, and rebinding tests.
misconceptions: Application string validation alone is a complete SSRF defense.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Combine URL grammar, allow or deny policy, address validation, redirect checks, proxy controls, egress isolation, metadata blocking, and rebinding tests.

competencies.statement: Align wire, decompression, XML, text, HTML sanitation, search, pagination, bulk, and export limits so one stage cannot amplify another.
misconceptions: Each subsystem can choose an unrelated generous limit safely.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Align wire, decompression, XML, text, HTML sanitation, search, pagination, bulk, and export limits so one stage cannot amplify another.

competencies.statement: Load typed configuration from approved sources, separate environments, redact values, rotate credentials, and reject insecure defaults.
misconceptions: Environment variables may be printed because operators already have access.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Load typed configuration from approved sources, separate environments, redact values, rotate credentials, and reject insecure defaults.

competencies.statement: Set purpose-bound retention for raw responses, content revisions, logs, reading state, accounts, backups, legal holds, and deletion verification.
misconceptions: Feed content is public, so retention and deletion do not matter.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Set purpose-bound retention for raw responses, content revisions, logs, reading state, accounts, backups, legal holds, and deletion verification.

competencies.statement: Build a minimal non-root pinned multi-stage image with exact binary, migrations, certificates, ownership, metadata, SBOM, signature, and vulnerability evidence.
misconceptions: A small image tag is automatically reproducible and trustworthy.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Build a minimal non-root pinned multi-stage image with exact binary, migrations, certificates, ownership, metadata, SBOM, signature, and vulnerability evidence.

competencies.statement: Validate configuration, secrets references, database compatibility, migration state, network policy, budgets, and dependency reachability before serving.
misconceptions: The service should start and discover configuration errors on first request.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Validate configuration, secrets references, database compatibility, migration state, network policy, budgets, and dependency reachability before serving.

competencies.statement: Separate liveness, readiness, startup, degraded ingestion, backlog, database, and maintenance states without exposing secrets or causing restart loops.
misconceptions: One endpoint that returns 200 when the process runs is complete health evidence.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate liveness, readiness, startup, degraded ingestion, backlog, database, and maintenance states without exposing secrets or causing restart loops.

competencies.statement: Run migrations through one owned release step with locks, timeout, compatibility gates, evidence, and explicit failure handling.
misconceptions: Every application replica may run migrations concurrently at startup.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Run migrations through one owned release step with locks, timeout, compatibility gates, evidence, and explicit failure handling.

competencies.statement: Canary compatible binaries and schema with traffic, worker, freshness, error-budget, rollback, and kill-switch evidence.
misconceptions: A successful container launch justifies immediate full rollout.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Canary compatible binaries and schema with traffic, worker, freshness, error-budget, rollback, and kill-switch evidence.

competencies.statement: Assign RPO, RTO, retention, encryption, restore, and rebuild strategy separately to accounts, subscriptions, reader state, feeds, entries, raw evidence, and telemetry.
misconceptions: All feed data can simply be fetched again after loss.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Assign RPO, RTO, retention, encryption, restore, and rebuild strategy separately to accounts, subscriptions, reader state, feeds, entries, raw evidence, and telemetry.

competencies.statement: Verify scheduled backups, WAL continuity, encryption, access, checksums, catalog, age, capacity, and restore eligibility.
misconceptions: A successful backup command proves the backup is usable.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Verify scheduled backups, WAL continuity, encryption, access, checksums, catalog, age, capacity, and restore eligibility.

competencies.statement: Restore into isolation, validate schema and application versions, reconcile counts and invariants, and prevent outbound fetching during inspection.
misconceptions: Restoring directly over production is the fastest recovery test.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Restore into isolation, validate schema and application versions, reconcile counts and invariants, and prevent outbound fetching during inspection.

competencies.statement: Define migration, database restore, secret rotation, scheduler pause, validator review, worker resume, cache rebuild, and client reopening order.
misconceptions: Workers should resume immediately so stale content refreshes sooner.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define migration, database restore, secret rotation, scheduler pause, validator review, worker resume, cache rebuild, and client reopening order.

competencies.statement: Rehearse region loss, corruption, accidental deletion, bad migration, credential leak, publisher incident, and partial restore with owned timelines.
misconceptions: One happy-path restore exercise covers every disaster.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Rehearse region loss, corruption, accidental deletion, bad migration, credential leak, publisher incident, and partial restore with owned timelines.

competencies.statement: Bind reviewed revision, generated code, migrations, dependency graph, tests, image digest, SBOM, signature, configuration, and deployment identity.
misconceptions: A mutable image tag identifies the reviewed release.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Bind reviewed revision, generated code, migrations, dependency graph, tests, image digest, SBOM, signature, configuration, and deployment identity.

competencies.statement: Demonstrate unfamiliar RSS and Atom sources from authorized discovery through bounded fetch, normalization, transaction, scheduling, API, accessible reader, and cleanup.
misconceptions: Replaying workshop fixtures is sufficient final mastery evidence.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Demonstrate unfamiliar RSS and Atom sources from authorized discovery through bounded fetch, normalization, transaction, scheduling, API, accessible reader, and cleanup.

competencies.statement: Triage freshness, publisher overload, SSRF, parser, database, tenant, content, search, rollout, and restore incidents with evidence-preserving containment.
misconceptions: Restarting the service is the first response to every incident.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Triage freshness, publisher overload, SSRF, parser, database, tenant, content, search, rollout, and restore incidents with evidence-preserving containment.

competencies.statement: Present useful, accessible, security, privacy, publisher, capacity, cost, migration, rollback, and recovery evidence to a cross-functional review board.
misconceptions: Technical test output alone answers every stakeholder concern.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Present useful, accessible, security, privacy, publisher, capacity, cost, migration, rollback, and recovery evidence to a cross-functional review board.

competencies.statement: Record unsupported feed constructs, platform limits, false-positive controls, accessibility findings, capacity boundaries, owners, deadlines, and stop conditions.
misconceptions: Passing release gates means no residual risk remains.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record unsupported feed constructs, platform limits, false-positive controls, accessibility findings, capacity boundaries, owners, deadlines, and stop conditions.

credential.title: Build and Ship a Production Feed Aggregator in Go 1.26 Certificate
